coordinateReference.conversion: NYC Open Data supplied the GeoJSON export in WGS84 longitude/latitude; repository processing performs no reprojection.

sourceNative.name: NAD83 / New York Long Island (US survey feet)

limitations: Boundaries reflect NYC Department of City Planning edition 26B, data date 2026-05, and can become stale after an official boundary update.

Because the official source is quarterly, the browser treats this spatial artifact as stale 120 calendar days after the recorded portalRowsUpdatedAtUtc timestamp unless a reviewed newer edition is vendored.
Geometry is an administrative precinct boundary, not an event location, inferred centroid, future incident location, or person-level record.

Coordinates are rounded to eight decimal places, the minimum fixed precision verified to preserve at least three distinct vertices in every ring, without vertex simplification or repository reprojection.
NYC and DCP provide the source for informational use without warranties of completeness, accuracy, content, or fitness for a particular use.
The artifact supplies geography only and does not contain forecasts, confidence intervals, risk scores, patrol priorities, or enforcement targets.

locationKeySemantics.mapping: Exact string mapping from the authoritative precinct property; no precinct is remapped, merged, dropped, or invented.

processing.canonicalJson: UTF-8, recursively sorted object keys, compact separators, finite JSON numbers, one trailing newline.
processing.generationTimestampPolicy: generatedAtUtc equals the reviewed source retrieval timestamp; the wall clock is never read.

dataset.publisher: New York City Department of City Planning (DCP)
dataset.title: Police Precincts

publicUse.summary: NYC Open Data states that Open Data has no use restrictions, and DCP metadata states that this dataset is freely available to the public with no fee. The City and DCP provide it for informational purposes without warranties of completeness, accuracy, content, or fitness for a particular use.

sourceSchema.conversion: NYC Open Data supplied the GeoJSON export in WGS84 longitude/latitude; repository processing performs no reprojection.
